import requests
from functools import lru_cache

REMOTE_CONFIG_URL = "https://config.example.com/app-config.json"
SERVICE_DISCOVERY_URL = "https://registry.example.com/services"


@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_remote_config() -> dict:
    response = requests.get(REMOTE_CONFIG_URL, timeout=5)
    return response.json()


@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_available_services() -> dict:
    resp = requests.get(SERVICE_DISCOVERY_URL, timeout=5)
    return resp.json()


def get_config_value(key: str):
    return get_remote_config().get(key)


def get_service_url(service_name: str) -> str:
    return get_available_services()[service_name]
